verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Waking up early in a cool dawn Kneeling and praying to you alone Worshipping you before your throne Seeking your face till in Your presence be drawn

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Just to please you is my desire To offer an aroma of praise you inspire And though there are times I'm unfaithful to you Oh Lord remember that I love you Still my desire is to please you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord I live to serve you And i give you the best in everything I do To make my whole life Obedient and true Holy and acceptable offering to you
